name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is a global technology company providing intelligent solutions from edge to cloud. Key offerings include HPE GreenLake hybrid cloud platform, AI-driven networking (including Juniper Networks portfolio), HPE Cray EX supercomputers, HPE ProLiant servers, storage solutions, and financial services. HPE serves small-to-large enterprises and government entities, focusing on networking, cloud, AI infrastructure, and data management with a platform-based, software-and-services-enriched business model.
